conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to F, E, and B during our pre-game chats. With F, we bonded over family priorities and even discussed strategies for the game, making me feel like we were on the same team; E shared their tough situation with job loss and family, which resonated with me as we both expressed genuine support for each other's goals; and B's story about their daughter's surgery touched me deeply, as we both emphasized how family keeps us going. In contrast, I felt least connected to D, as our conversation felt more surface-level, focusing on their stock market losses without building the same level of mutual understanding or emotional depth. 

I did make an agreement with F to propose a group chat for sharing needs and voting on a fair split to keep things honest. Going into the game, I trust F based on our open communication and shared family values, but I don't specifically distrust anyone else yet, as most conversations were positive and supportive.
